titles.title: Tears are a language God understands

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Often you wonder why Tears come into your eyes And burdens seem to be much more than you can stand But God is standing near He sees your falling tears Tears are a language God understands

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God sees the tears of a broken hearted soul He sees your tears and hears them when they fall God weeps along with man and takes Him by the hand Tears are a language God understands

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When grief has left you low It causes tears to flow And things have not turned out the way that you had planned But God won't forget you His promises are true Tears are a language God understands
